title: Small-System Architecture, Data Boundaries, and Decision Records · Independent Product Trial
summary: An independent public-benefit team supplies different users, constraints, risks, technology, data, and failure conditions and transfers small-system architecture, data boundaries, and decision records into a changed bounded architecture and data contract packet. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded architecture and data contract packet with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Derive architecture from user flows, quality attributes, risk, data sensitivity, team capacity, and change likelihood.
Separate domain decisions from interface, persistence, network, clock, identity, and third-party effects through narrow owned boundaries.
Model identities, states, relationships, invariants, invalid cases, provenance, and lifecycle before choosing storage representation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Architecture Driver
steps.instruction:
lab case — Framework handlers mutate shared records and call storage and services directly, making one changed rule require edits across the product. The lab variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Derive architecture from user flows, quality attributes, risk, data sensitivity, team capacity, and change likelihood.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Lab Architecture Driver.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for derive architecture from user flows, quality attributes, risk, data sensitivity, team capacity, and change likelihood. For Commit to the mission model · Lab Architecture Driver, keep Architecture Driver connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Decision Record

content.code:
pp1-decision-record-1rveh8:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

stimulus.title: Decision Record failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed

lines.label: required

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Decision Record condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model · Lab Decision Record
steps.instruction:

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Record context, forces, alternatives, decision, consequences, evidence, review trigger, and supersession for consequential choices.
